# E-rádios Backend - Project Setup

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.

- [ ] Clarify Project Requirements
	Node.js backend with Express, MongoDB (Mongoose), TypeScript, JWT authentication, .env configuration

- [ ] Scaffold the Project
	Create Node.js + TypeScript + Express + MongoDB project structure

- [ ] Customize the Project
	Set up authentication, routes, controllers, models, middleware

- [ ] Install Required Extensions
	Install necessary VS Code extensions if any

- [ ] Compile the Project
	Install dependencies and compile TypeScript

- [ ] Create and Run Task
	Create tasks for development server

- [ ] Launch the Project
	Test the server

- [ ] Ensure Documentation is Complete
	Update README.md with setup instructions
